hero.title:
Dark worlds.
Bold stories.
hero.description: Cenoir Studios crafts immersive, narrative-driven experiences set in atmospheric worlds where every shadow tells a story and every choice carries weight.

featured.label: Featured Project
featured.title: NoSaints: New Dawn
featured.description: A dark and stylish first-person shooter driven by narrative and mystery, set in a world of airships, crumbling cities, and fractured alliances.

pillars.title: Narrative First
pillars.text: Every mechanic, every environment, every encounter serves the story we want to tell.

pillars.title: Art-Driven
pillars.text: Stylized visuals that create mood and atmosphere beyond what realism alone can achieve.

pillars.title: Built With Purpose
pillars.text: Feature-oriented architecture and MVP patterns keep our codebase clean and our iteration fast.
